name: claude-project-cleaner
description: Post-project cleanup skill for Claude Code — scan, classify, and safely clean up assets downloaded during development

scripts.cleanup: python scripts/scanner.py && python scripts/organizer.py && python scripts/cleaner.py --auto
scripts.report: python scripts/scanner.py && python scripts/organizer.py && python scripts/cleaner.py --report-only

author: leo-younger
